query: INSERT OR IGNORE INTO block_tag_refs (source_id, tag_id) SELECT ?1, je.value FROM json_each(?2) je WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM blocks WHERE id = je.value AND block_type = 'tag' AND deleted_at IS NULL) AND (?3 IS NULL OR ?3 = ( SELECT bp.value_ref FROM block_properties bp JOIN blocks tgt ON tgt.id = bp.block_id AND tgt.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE bp.block_id = COALESCE( (SELECT page_id FROM blocks WHERE id = je.value AND deleted_at IS NULL), je.value) AND bp.key = 'space' LIMIT 1))
